title: poa buckleyana var. stenophylla
intro: Poa buckleyana var. stenophylla, also known as Buckley's Bluegrass, is a variety of grass in the Poa genus, characterized by its narrow leaves and blue-green color. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Poa buckleyana var. stenophylla are believed to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
